subject: Tall armored humanoid figure with light hair and gold-trim armor, theatrical confident stance amid energy effects
description: A tall humanoid figure stands in a theatrical, self-assured pose in mid-shot. The figure has light-colored hair and wears armor with gold-trim detailing. Purple or lavender energy effects radiate in the background. The stance reads as confident bordering on vain — weight shifted, composed rather than actively attacking. No weapon is clearly visible in hand; the figure's arms are positioned in a dramatic resting posture. The overall register is elite soldier who performs composure as much as combat readiness.
foreground: tall armored figure with light hair and gold-trim armor
